followup_query: Morpho audit report site:github.com OR site:gitlab.com pdf

broad_results.title: Audits - Security Reviews – Morpho Docs
broad_results.content: A whole article was dedicated to the Morpho Security Framework. The Morpho apps and smart contracts have been audited extensively by a wide range of security firms, with every new app and feature undergoing audits before release.

broad_results.title: Morpho (Aave V3) Smart Contract Audit - Chainsecurity
broad_results.content: The most critical subjects covered in our audit are access control, functional correctness and precision of arithmetic operations. Access control is extensive. Functional correctness of the main contracts is high.

broad_results.title: Smart Contract Audit - Morpho Vault V2 - ChainSecurity
broad_results.content: Morpho Labs implements the second version of Morpho curated vaults. Read the smart contract audit by ChainSecurity.

broad_results.title: OpenZeppelin | Smart Contract Security Audits
broad_results.content: Read the reports · Our security ... in TVL - including reward distribution flaws in Radiant Riz, potential bad debt creation in AAVE V3, and potential skipping of bad debt socialization in Morpho Blue....

broad_results.title: volt-protocol-core/audits/venue-audits/morpho.md at develop · volt-protocol/volt-protocol-core
broad_results.content: Before diving into smart contract implementations, architecture and the different heuristics that informed this report, it is important to first understand the internal security posture of the Morpho team. The current smart contract implementation has received 12 audits from top audit firms ...

broad_results.title: PUBLIC Code Assessment of the Morpho (Aave v3) Smart Contracts August 19, 2022
broad_results.content: Thank you for trusting us to help Morpho Labs with this security audit. Our executive summary provides · an overview of subjects covered in our audit of the latest reviewed contracts of Morpho (Aave v3)

broad_results.title: Morpho Vaults Security Analysis by Pessimistic This report is public
broad_results.content: In this report, we consider the security of smart contracts of Morpho Vaults project. Our task · is to find and describe security issues in the smart contracts of the platform. ... The audit does not give any warranties on the security of the code.

broad_results.title: Morpho Blue IRM Smart Contract Audit | Cantina
broad_results.content: To verify the soundness of this upgrade, Morpho engaged Cantina for a security audits review of its SpeedJump IRM implementation.

broad_results.title: Risk & Security Documentation – Morpho Docs
broad_results.content: The full list of audits is available in the Audits section. There is an inherent risk that the protocol could contain a smart contract vulnerability or bug. Several security measures are employed to mitigate this risk:

broad_results.title: What is a Smart Contract Audit & Choosing a Partner | Three Sigma
broad_results.content: Outcome: Strengthened protocol security, enhanced user confidence, and contributed to the platform's success. Morpho has shown its commitment to blockchain security by undergoing multiple audits with top-tier firms, including Spearbit, OpenZeppelin, and Trail of Bits...
